The Nelscott Reef Tow-In Surf Championships involve the world’s best big-wave tow-in surfers including World Champion Garrett MacNamara and XXL champion Brad Gerlach who, along with 20 other world-class surfers, attempt to tame this monster of the sea.

Dylan’s a family-oriented player who got five touchdowns across his first two games in America. Luca’s been CAI’s starting quarterback since eighth grade and has both the brains and the dedication to go far. See just what these players can do in this episode of Country Ball!

programme.title: Country Ball

programme.title: Country Ball

programme.title: Country Ball

Powerful stories of resilience, protection, and purpose unfold in this compelling first episode.

programme.title: Locked On NHL
programme.desc:
A rotating cast of local hosts from the Locked On Podcast Network guide you through each day in the National Hockey League with a collection of themed shows. Gil Martin gets started on Mondays by checking in with three of the network's local experts to chat about the biggest stories going on league-wide. Tuesday sees Mike DiStefano and Ross Levitan take stock of the Eastern Conference, followed by a Western Conference check-in on Wednesdays with Brett Holden and Jess Belmosto. Chris Micieli and Adam Denker present league Power Rankings every Thursday. Things wrap up on Fridays as DiBiase and Rachel Donner review the week that was and look ahead to the weekend slate of action in the NHL.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.title: S2E1 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike brings you the world’s most thrilling rides. Watch Sam Reynolds, street shredder, Clemens Kaudela, slopestyle champion, Theo Erlangsen, trail innovator, and Vincent Tupin, downhill powerhouse, in an exhilarating GoPro Course Preview in South Africa. Then head to Zion, Utah for Red Bull Rampage with Jaxson Riddle, big-air phenom, Reed Boggs, freeride master, Thomas Genon, slopestyle superstar, and Tom Van Steenbergen, trail blazing pro, as they push the limits of skill and courage on some of the planet’s most extreme terrain.

programme.title: S2E2 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you on epic rides around the world. Watch Olympic gold medalist Conor Fields, BMX champion, compete at the highest level, then join GoPro athletes Sam Pilgrim, urban downhill master, Geoff Gulevich, trail expert, and Sam Reynolds, street shredder, as they explore the stunning landscapes and dramatic terrain of Cappadocia, Turkey. Adventure, speed, and skill collide in every breathtaking moment.

programme.title: S2E3 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you to the world’s most extreme mountain biking adventures. Watch Geoff Gulevich, trail master, tackle some of the gnarliest chutes in Williams Lake, BC, dropping in with local legend Cory Brunelle, downhill expert. Then experience some of the best riders from around the globe as they conquer massive mountains, perform jaw-dropping tricks, and push the limits of skill and adrenaline in breathtaking terrain.

programme.desc: Tom Tyler plays Tom Wade, a range detective whose brother has been accused of robbery and murder. Wade has only one clue to prove his brothers innocence: a set of unusual tire tracks. This film was directed by Sam Katzman, who later became known as Jun...

programme.title: The Fighting Redhead
programme.desc: When a rustler named Faro kills one of his own henchmen and blames it on Sheila O'Conner, Red and Little Beaver set out to clear Sheila and to find evidence against Faro and his gang.

programme.title: Part I - Leaving
programme.desc: Two former Texas Rangers decide to strike out from their south Texas base and drive a cattle herd to Montana.

programme.title: Part II - On The Trail
programme.desc: McCrae and Wood's cattle drive faces deadly situations.

programme.title: Part III - The Plains
programme.desc: Gus and July save Lorena from Blue Duck, but at a deadly cost. Jake runs with a bad crowd and pays the price.

programme.title: Part IV - Return
programme.desc: The cattle drive reaches Nebraska, where Gus and Clara reunite.

programme.title: Part I - The Vision
programme.desc: Back in Texas, Capt. Call organizes a mustang drive to Montana.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A stranger arrives on the McCain ranch claiming to be a friend of Lucas'.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas refuses help to an old man running from a gang of criminals.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A group of hill folk is installed as peace officers in a town near North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An elderly recluse with a mean reputation helps Lucas rescue Mark.

programme.title: Gunfight at Black Horse Canyon
programme.desc: Jay Squire is an ex-con seeking vengeance on Jim Hardie, who sent him to prison ten years prior.

programme.title: Wagon Train: Season 2, Episode 21:Trail To The West
programme.desc: A young woman joins the wagon train, mourning the recent death of her husband in the Civil War. Struggling to cope with her grief while facing the harsh realities of the trail, she encounters a fellow traveler whose own troubled past helps her confront her loss and find the strength to look toward the future

programme.title: Wagon Train: Season 2, Episode 34: The Naomi Kaylor Story
programme.desc: A former cabaret entertainer joins the wagon train, hoping to escape her past reputation and start a respectable new life in the West. Her attempt at reinvention is jeopardized when a man from her previous life arrives in the camp, threatening to expose her history to the other passengers and destroy the future she is trying to build

programme.title: The Rifleman: S1E4 - Lucas Helps The Town Drunk Sober Up
programme.desc: When a local alcoholic is falsely accused of a crime he did not commit, Lucas McCain steps in to defend him. Lucas works to help the man sober up and reclaim his dignity, ultimately aiding the local marshal in uncovering the truth and ensuring that justice is served for the town's downtrodden resident

programme.title: The Rifleman: S1 E 3 - End of A Young Gun
programme.desc: Lucas McCain takes in a young, rebellious drifter named Michael Anthony Northrup, hoping to provide him with the guidance he lacks. However, Lucas's efforts are complicated when the young man’s outlaw father arrives in town, intent on forcing his son to choose between a life of crime and the honest path Lucas has offered

programme.title: The Rifleman: S1 E7 - Lucas And A Rich Man Teach The Town Bully A Lesson
programme.desc: When a notorious and wealthy gunfighter arrives in North Fork, he intimidates the townspeople with his reputation and arrogance. Seeking to end the bully's reign of terror, Lucas McCain joins forces with an unlikely ally to humble the gunman and prove that intimidation cannot override the strength of a united community

programme.title: Fugitive Valley (1941) Colorized
programme.desc: In Fugitive Valley, the Rough Riders ride again! When an outlaw gang takes refuge in a hidden valley and begins terrorizing nearby ranchers, U.S. Marshals Buck Roberts (Buck Jones), Tim McCall (Tim McCoy), and Sandy Hopkins (Raymond Hatton) saddle up to bring them down. With six-guns blazing, daring stunts, and the trio’s trademark camaraderie, this action-packed Western delivers frontier justice straight to the heart of outlaw country.

programme.title: Heldorado
programme.desc: Heldorado is an annual parade celebrating Las Vegas as a frontier town. Roy is captain of the guards at Boulder Dam. He helps celebrate the town's anniversary while capturing racketeers involved with the local casinos.

programme.title: Arizona
programme.desc: Perrin is a cowboy who comes to the aid of local Indians being swindled out of their gold. He signs on as a ranch foreman, but learns the ranch is the home of the crooks.

programme.title: Django Defies Sartana 1970
programme.desc: In Django Defies Sartana, two of the West’s deadliest gunslingers clash in a storm of bullets and betrayal. When Django is framed for a ruthless robbery, Sartana rides in to bring him down—but both soon uncover a darker plot driving the violence. Torn between rivalry and reluctant alliance, the two face off against treachery, outlaws, and each other in a Spaghetti Western loaded with double-crosses, blazing shootouts, and nonstop action.

programme.title: Far Frontier
programme.desc: Willis Newcomb and Bart Carroll head a gang engaged in smuggling wanted-American criminals back into the United States from Mexico. Operating from Sharperville, an oil town on the American side of the border, they transport their human cargo in oil drums loaded on trucks. Border Patrolman Tom Sharper intercepts one of the trucks but is overpowered and left for dead
